values.areas_inspected: Kitchen, both bathrooms, under appliances, sink cabinets
values.harborage_locations: Behind refrigerator, dishwasher kick plate, under-sink cabinet hinge gaps
values.treatment_performed: Gel bait placements, IGR application, crack & crevice treatment, vacuumed visible activity
values.prep_for_customer: Store food sealed, reduce cardboard, avoid cleaning treated cracks for 2 weeks

todaysResult.headline: Cockroach activity was moderate today.
todaysResult.body: We found German cockroach activity concentrated behind the refrigerator and dishwasher, placed gel bait and growth regulator in all activity areas, and treated cracks and crevices.
todaysResult.nextStep: A follow-up visit in about 14 days is recommended for German cockroaches.
